subcodes.first_line: The Nightingale of Glory proclaimeth: O ye denizens of immortality! The Bulbul of faithfulness calleth out: O ye people of fidelity! The hoopoe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عندلیب سنا میگوید الی یا اهل البقاء بلبل وفا میگوید الی یا اهل الوفاء هدهد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mystical themes, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the first and the last; the seen and the hidden
